records.name: keylight-control
records.description: A desktop app for controlling Elgato Key Lights on Linux, where no official client exists. Adjust power, brightness, and color temperature for every light on the network from one window.

records.name: pyrepl
records.description: A browser-based Python REPL built on Pyodide, made for teaching a foundations unit without asking students to install anything. Code persists locally in IndexedDB and compresses into a shareable link.

records.name: webrepl
records.description: A browser-based HTML/CSS editor built using service workers. Code persists locally in IndexedDB and compresses into a shareable link.

records.name: forlenza-scada
records.description: A simulated industrial SCADA control interface, built to demonstrate the compatibility quirks and failure modes common to legacy control systems — a teaching prop dressed as the real thing.

records.name: home-assistant-tray
records.description: A lightweight system-tray app that embeds your Home Assistant dashboard in a popup window, so the whole house is one click away without a browser tab open all day.

records.name: cpp-enhancer
records.description: A browser extension to enhance the user experience of the NYC Career Pathways website.

records.name: thumbhash-py
records.description: A Python port of thumbhash — a very compact representation of an image used to render a blurred placeholder while the real one loads.

records.name: sendy-shopify-sync
records.description: A small service that keeps Shopify customers in sync with Sendy mailing lists, so the newsletter audience updates itself.

records.name: cpat
records.description: Automation tool for NYC Schools' Career Pathways Portal.

records.name: staten-island-ferry-app
records.description: Android app built around the ferry schedule.
